results.name: V1 deque maxlen 超出旧条目被丢
V2 ratio 正确 + sad ratio ≥ 0.6 触发 alert
V3 cooldown 抑制重复 + 时间到再次触发
V4 alert 写入 ProfilePersist.emotion_alerts + ProactiveScheduler 记账
V5 prefer bump + select_topic_seed 选安慰 + 到期还原
